title: Self-Evolution Triangular Architecture
brief: Technical infographic showing the triangular self-evolution architecture of an AI agent system. Three interconnected modules: Auto Skill Generation (task completion leads to SKILL.md creation), Runtime Self-Repair (fuzzy find-and-replace patches skills during use), and Curator (idle-triggered merging of narrow skills into umbrella skills). Show them as three nodes forming a closed feedback loop with arrows. Clean flat infographic style, soft professional palette, concise Chinese/English bilingual labels. Suitable for insertion into a WeChat tech article read on mobile phones.
prompt:
